title: Resolution Adopting Executive Order No. 182 S. 2020 Entitled ?an Order Prohibiting the Sale, Distribution and Consumption of Alcoholic Beverages in All Public Places in the Municipality of Los Baños During the State of Calamity. (AUTHOR(S): Councilor(s) Miko C. Pelegrina, Janos S. Lapiz, Geronimo A. Ciceron, Marlo Pj A. Alipon, Mark Lester B. Dizon, Cris Dayril B. Bagnes, and Jozylyn N. Manansala, 03/23/2020)
